title: Elite ISA (Inside Sales Agent) – Real Estate Industry – Perfect English Required
description:
We are looking for an exceptional Inside Sales Agent (ISA) to join our team.



You will be speaking directly with real estate broker owners and real estate companies in the United States, helping them discover solutions that improve their business.



This role is not high-pressure sales.

It is about service, curiosity, and starting valuable conversations.



You must speak excellent, natural English that sounds very comfortable to American business owners.



If you love helping people and enjoy professional conversations with successful entrepreneurs, this could be a great role for you.



About Our Company



We are the creators of Paperless Pipeline, a software platform used by thousands of real estate professionals across the United States.



Our mission is simple:



Help real estate brokers run better businesses.



We serve brokerage owners, team leaders, and agents across the country.



The founder of the company is stepping back into a more active leadership role and wants to personally reconnect with our customers.



That’s where you come in.



Your First Mission



Your first responsibility will be calling our 1,800 existing customers and booking 15-minute conversations with the founder.



These are friendly check-in conversations, not sales calls.



Your job is simply to:



• Call brokerage owners

• Thank them for being customers

• Ask if they’d like a quick conversation with the founder

• Book a 15-minute appointment



The purpose is to listen and improve the product.



Future Responsibilities



Once the first phase is complete, your role will expand to include revenue-generating activities.



Your role will likely become 50% relationship calls / 50% opportunity creation.



Examples include:



Customer Success Calls

• Calling existing customers

• Booking founder conversations

• Asking how we can improve the product



Growth Calls

• Calling real estate brokerages

• Introducing our platform

• Booking demo appointments with our team



Your role is to create high-quality conversations.



Who This Job Is Perfect For



You might be perfect for this role if you:



• Speak excellent, natural English

• Sound comfortable speaking with American professionals

• Enjoy professional phone conversations

• Are curious and enjoy asking good questions

• Like helping people succeed

• Are organized and dependable

• Want a long-term role with a growing company



Experience in real estate, appointment setting, or ISA work is a major plus.



Requirements



Please apply only if you meet these requirements:



• Excellent spoken English

• Minimal to no accent

• Clear phone presence

• Comfortable speaking with U.S. business owners

• Reliable internet connection

• Quiet working environment

• Professional attitude



Bonus points if you have experience with:



• Real estate

• calling U.S. clients

• CRM systems

• appointment setting



Compensation



We are looking for someone long-term and will compensate accordingly.



Compensation includes:



• Competitive monthly salary

• Performance bonuses

• Long-term growth opportunity



Top performers will have opportunities to move into larger revenue-generating roles.



Work Schedule



This role requires overlap with U.S. business hours.



Expected schedule:



U.S. daytime hours (Central Time).



How To Apply



To apply, please include:



A short video introducing yourself (1–2 minutes)



An audio recording reading the following sentence:

Final Note

title: Recruiting Sourcer and Lead Generation Specialist - Spend Talent (Remote, Fast Growth)
description:
Job Description:



We're a recruiting agency that places creative strategists and marketing professionals at DTC and e-commerce brands in the US. We're growing fast and need someone dedicated to finding candidates and building prospect lists across multiple platforms.



This role is the engine behind our pipeline. You find the people. We handle everything else.



What You'll Do



Build targeted candidate prospect lists of creative strategists, media buyers, creative directors, and similar marketing professionals. Source candidates across LinkedIn, Sales Navigator, X/Twitter, job boards, company websites, freelance platforms, and online communities. Build client prospect lists of DTC and ecom founders, CEOs, and marketing leaders. Use data scraping and enrichment tools (Apollo, Phantom Buster, Hunter, Snov, Clay, or similar) to find
 addresses, LinkedIn URLs, and contact information. Draft outreach messages using pre-written scripts and templates for review and approval before sending. Monitor our LinkedIn job listing for new applicants and flag promising candidates. Research candidates before vetting calls and compile pre-call briefs with relevant background info. Maintain and update all prospect lists in Airtable, keeping data clean, current, and organized. Remove placed candidates, update changed information, and add new prospects on a continuous basis. Track all outreach activity and response rates in Airtable.



What You Won't Do



You won't be on calls with candidates or clients. You won't make decisions about who to present or hire. You won't manage client relationships. You won't handle agreements, invoices, or negotiations. Your focus is finding and organizing people. We handle the conversations and placements.



Who You Are



Strong written English. This is non-negotiable. Every message you draft will go out under our brand. Detail-oriented and highly organized. Sloppy data entry or messy spreadsheets won't work here. Self-motivated. You'll be given daily targets and trusted to hit them without micromanagement. Comfortable with research and online investigation. You enjoy digging through profiles, websites, and platforms to find the right people. Reliable internet connection and a quiet work environment. Available during US business hours (minimum 4 to 6 hours of overlap with EST).



Required Experience



Experience with LinkedIn and ideally LinkedIn Sales Navigator. Experience with at least one data scraping or lead generation tool (Apollo, Phantom Buster, Hunter, Snov, Clay, or similar). Experience building prospect lists or lead lists in a professional setting. Comfortable with CRM or database tools like Airtable, Google Sheets, or similar.



Bonus (not required but a plus)



Experience in recruiting or talent sourcing. Familiarity with the DTC, ecommerce, or digital marketing space. Experience with X/Twitter research and outreach. Experience with Meta Ad Library or similar ad intelligence tools.



Tools We Use



Airtable (our CRM). LinkedIn Sales Navigator. Google Workspace. PandaDoc. Various data enrichment and scraping tools.



How to Apply



Send a short message introducing yourself. Include your relevant experience with sourcing or lead generation. Mention which data scraping or enrichment tools you've used. Include a link to your LinkedIn profile if you have one.

title: Remote Marketing & Content Designer (Graphics, Social Media, Ads)
description:
Remote Marketing & Content Designer (Graphics, Social Media, Ads)



We are a growing landscaping company based in Virginia, USA looking for a long-term remote marketing designer to help create graphics and visual content for our marketing campaigns.



This role focuses on designing graphics and visuals, not managing marketing strategy. You will work directly with our marketing manager to create professional content that showcases our landscaping projects and services.



About Our Company



We design and build residential outdoor spaces including patios, walkways, planting designs, fire pits, retaining walls, and lakefront landscapes.



Our projects provide great visuals that can be turned into marketing content. Your role will be to help transform our project photos and designs into high-quality marketing graphics.



Responsibilities



Create marketing graphics for:



• social media posts

• Google ads and online ads

• website visuals

• EDDM postcards and mailers

• service promotion graphics



Create before and after visuals from project photos.



Create graphics highlighting services such as:



• paver patios

• outdoor fire pits

• landscape lighting

• planting designs

• lakefront landscaping



Assist with photo editing and visual improvements for marketing materials.



Help create consistent design templates for our brand.



Software Experience Preferred



Photoshop

Illustrator

Canva

Figma (optional)



Required Skills



Strong graphic design ability



Experience creating marketing or social media graphics



Ability to edit and enhance photographs



Attention to detail and strong layout skills



Good English communication



Ability to follow design direction and brand guidelines



Work Schedule



This is a full-time remote position (40 hours per week).



Workload may vary week to week. When fewer marketing graphics are needed, the designer may assist with:



• organizing photo libraries

• creating design templates

• preparing marketing visuals from past projects

• helping develop graphics for website pages or future campaigns



When Applying

Software you are most comfortable using

Your expected hourly rate

title: Performance Marketing Ads | Learn High-Level Ad Editing for a Global Jewelry Brand
description:
Full-Time AI Video Editor

Performance Marketing Ads | Learn High-Level Ad Editing for a Global Jewelry Brand



We are looking for a full-time AI Video Editor who wants to become an expert in performance marketing video ads.



This role is not just about editing clips together. It is about learning how high-performing advertisement videos are built. You will learn how to structure ads, place B-roll correctly, control pacing, and create videos that are designed to convert viewers into customers.



You will work with AI-generated footage, product visuals, talking characters, and creative concepts, and turn them into powerful advertisement videos used in real marketing campaigns.



Our jewelry brand sells to customers all over the world and runs large-scale advertising campaigns every day. The videos you create will be used directly in these campaigns and seen by millions of potential customers.



This position is perfect for someone who wants to become highly skilled in ad editing, B-roll placement, and performance-driven video creation.



What You Will Learn and Do



Edit advertisement videos for our global jewelry brand

Turn scripts and raw footage into structured marketing videos

Learn how high-converting ad videos are structured

Master B-roll placement to improve storytelling and engagement

Work with AI-generated video footage and talking characters

Improve pacing, hooks, captions, and transitions to keep viewers watching

Understand the psychology behind performance marketing videos

Produce around 10 finished ad videos per day (1–2 minutes each)

Ensure videos look natural, professional, and not obviously AI-generated

Collaborate with the marketing and creative team to improve ad concepts



You will gain real experience creating videos that directly impact advertising performance and revenue.



What We Are Looking For



Strong video editing skills

Interest in learning performance marketing and ad psychology

Ability to edit quickly while maintaining quality

Someone comfortable producing a high volume of videos

Good visual taste and strong sense of pacing

Attention to detail

Reliable and available during working hours

Motivated to improve and grow as a performance marketing video editor



Experience with AI video tools is a plus but not required. The most important thing is your willingness to learn and continuously improve.



Tools You May Work With



Video editing software (Premiere, CapCut, Final Cut, or similar)

Kling AI

AI image-to-video tools

AI talking video generators

Other modern AI creative tools used for advertising



Apply here

6.Analyze campaign performance and provide clear reports and insights

title: ClickUp Expert (Remote | Project-Based)
description:
We are hiring a ClickUp expert who can build clean, organized, scalable systems for an SEO agency. We want someone who understands how to take complex workflows and turn them into simple, easy-to-use structures that remove confusion, speed up execution, and make day-to-day operations run smoothly.



If you’ve built advanced ClickUp infrastructures before — especially for an agency environment — we want to see your work. Experience building systems for SEO teams is highly preferred.



This role is project-based and focused on creating a complete, streamlined setup that supports long-term operational efficiency.



?



What You Will Do



• Audit our current processes and identify inefficiencies

• Design and build ClickUp systems that are clear, simple, and easy for teams to follow

• Create structure around tasks, recurring workflows, automations, and reporting

• Set up spaces, folders, lists, custom fields, statuses, and templates

• Build automations and dependencies that reduce manual work

• Document the entire system so it is easy for the team to understand and manage

• Suggest improvements that support SEO workflows, communication, and delivery



?



Requirements



• Proven experience building advanced ClickUp systems

• Ability to design clean, logical, easy-to-understand structures

• Experience creating automations, dashboards, views, and templates

• Strong understanding of workflow design and process architecture

• Experience working with agencies (SEO agency experience is a major plus)

• Clear communication and the ability to explain systems in simple terms

• Ability to work independently and deliver well-documented solutions



?



Preferred Experience



• Previous ClickUp setup specifically for SEO processes such as keyword research, audits, content planning, reporting, link building, and client updates

• Experience converting messy or outdated systems into clean streamlined workflows

• Ability to simplify complexity without losing capability



?



What We Offer



• Project-based role with competitive compensation

• Clear objectives and fast decision-making

title: Fitness Virtual Assistant (Workout Creator for Wellness App)
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a reliable Virtual Assistant with basic fitness knowledge to help create workout routines for our wellness and fitness app. Your main job will be to use our custom AI tool to generate workouts and then input them into our admin panel.



This is a structured task-based role where you will follow clear instructions to create organized workouts for our users.



Your Main Responsibilities



• Use our custom AI tool to generate workout routines

• Enter workouts into our admin panel

• Ensure each workout includes exercises, sets, and reps

• Organize workouts by category (beginner, intermediate, advanced, etc.)

• Double-check workouts for clarity and accuracy

• Maintain a spreadsheet log of all workouts created



Daily Workflow Example



Use the AI tool to generate a workout



Review the exercises for accuracy



Enter the workout into the admin panel



Log the workout in the tracking spreadsheet



Example workout:



Workout Name: Full Body Starter

Exercises:

• Squats – 3 sets x 10 reps

• Push-ups – 3 sets x 10 reps

• Lunges – 3 sets x 12 reps

• Plank – 3 sets x 30 seconds



Spreadsheet Tracking



You will maintain a spreadsheet containing:



• Workout name

• Workout category

• Equipment type (gym / home / no equipment)

• Difficulty level

• Date created

• Status (entered into system)



Requirements



• Basic understanding of fitness exercises

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to follow instructions carefully

• Comfortable using web dashboards and AI tools

• Good internet connection



Nice to Have



• Background in fitness, personal training, or sports science

• Experience creating workout plans

• Experience working as a Virtual Assistant



Output Expectations



• Create multiple workouts per day

• Maintain consistent formatting

• Keep the workout spreadsheet updated daily



Work Details



• Remote position

• Flexible schedule

• Long-term opportunity for the right person



To Apply



Please include the following:



Your experience with fitness or workout programming



Any experience working as a VA



Your internet speed

title: Social Media Manager
description:
We sell professional pressure washing and soft washing equipment online. We need someone to run our social media presence across all platforms — TikTok, Instagram,
, YouTube, and LinkedIn.



This is not a "schedule some posts and disappear" role. You'll be the voice of our brand online — engaging our community, writing copy that converts, building relationships with influencers in the cleaning industry, and coordinating with our video editor to distribute content strategically.



You'll own:

— Posting strategy and content calendar across all platforms

— Captions, copy, and hashtag strategy for every post

— DMs, comments, and community engagement (you are the front line)

— Influencer and affiliate outreach in the pressure washing / home services space

— Coordinating with our video editor on content scheduling and distribution

— Proposing strategy, getting approval, then running it independently



The goal: Brand awareness + community of pressure washing contractors + driving traffic and sales to our site. You need to understand all three and know which lever to pull when.



Think Duolingo, Gymshark, Judy's Family Cafe — brands that lead with personality, not product specs. If you don't know who these are, this probably isn't the right fit.



Ads coordination: You'll work closely with our ads manager to ensure paid content hits as hard as our organic. That means reviewing ad creative before it goes live, making sure the copy and visuals match the voice and standards we've built organically, flagging what's working in organic that could be turned into a paid ad, and sharing audience insights from your community engagement that can sharpen ad targeting. You don't run the ads — but you're the quality filter and the bridge between what our audience responds to organically and what we put dollars behind.



On AI: We expect you to use AI tools on the job to move faster and work smarter — that's a plus, not a problem. But during the hiring process, we need to see YOUR thinking. Every response, every Loom, every answer should be 100% your own brain. We're hiring a strategist, not a prompt engineer. If we sense AI-generated answers in your application or communications, you're out. We need someone who can think originally and uses AI to enhance their output — not replace it.



Don't apply if you think social media management is just scheduling posts, you can't write engaging copy on the fly, or you've never grown and engaged a real community.



To apply, include ALL of the following:



1. A short Loom video (2 min max) — pick any brand in the cleaning, trades, or home services space and break down what they're doing right and wrong on social media.

2. Links to social media accounts you've managed or grown (with context on what you did).

3. Name 3–5 brands or creators you follow for social media inspiration and why.



Applications missing any of these will not be reviewed.

This is not a beginner VA role. We are looking for someone who is proactive, organized, and

comfortable managing multiple moving parts in a fast-paced online business.



ROLE RESPONSIBILITIES

Operations & Systems

• Oversee backend systems and platforms across the business

• Set up and manage funnels, upsell flows, tripwires, and backend o?ers

• Manage automations and confirmation
 setups (copy will be provided when needed)

• Ensure systems, platforms, and processes remain organized and functional

Campaign Execution

• Ensure campaign timelines are executed properly

• Prepare funnels, checkout pages, and backend systems before launches

• Monitor links, automation, and systems during campaign periods

• Keep the CEO updated on progress and deadlines

system is set up

Operational Oversight

• Manage team coordination and ensure tasks are completed on time

• Identify backend improvements to make systems more e?cient

---

REPORTING & ACCOUNTABILITY

Weekly CEO Update

Each week you will provide a short operations update including:

• What was completed that week

• What is being worked on next

• Any issues or blockers

• Any recommendations

Campaign / Monthly Audit

At the end of each campaign (or month if no campaign is active), you will provide a short audit

covering:

Community Retention

Part of this role includes monitoring community churn and suggesting improvements such as:

• suggesting automations or exit feedback messages

• recommending improvements for retention and engagement



IDEAL CANDIDATE

You are:

• Highly organized and systems-oriented

• Comfortable managing multiple projects and deadlines

• Proactive and able to identify operational improvements

• Strong communicator who keeps leadership informed

Experience with platforms such as ConvertKit, funnels, automation tools, and community

platforms is strongly preferred.



OUR GOAL

The purpose of this role is to ensure the backend of the business runs smoothly, e?ciently, and

proactively so we avoid last-minute issues and continuously improve how the business operates.



TO APPLY

Please include:

1. A short introduction about your experience as an OBM

2. Examples of launches or funnels you have managed

3. The platforms and systems you are most experienced with



Applications without these details will not be considered.

title: Property Manager
description:
**Job Title:** Remote Property Manager / Virtual Assistant – 36-Unit Boarding House (Tech-Focused, Part-Time Start)



**Type:** Part-time (starting at 20 hours/week; potential to increase to full-time as we add properties/clients)  

**Salary:** $500–$800 per month (negotiable based on experience, performance, and hours worked; equivalent to ~$6–$10/hour)  

**Hours:** Approximately 20 hours/week to start, with flexibility for overlap during US Eastern Time business hours (owner in Ohio, USA). Reliable availability for tenant phone/email support during key times.



**Job Overview**  

We manage a 36-unit boarding house in Dayton, Ohio (301 Troy Street), and are seeking a reliable, tech-savvy Remote Property Manager (VA) in the Philippines. Using digital tools like Rent Manager (core PM software), Payanywhere online payment portal, automated smart lock app, GoHighLevel (marketing), and Swann & Sonoff camera systems, you'll handle daily operations remotely—no on-site work. You'll manage tenant communications, payments, access, maintenance, and quality checks—**everything except final major decisions** (owner approves those). Full training on our systems provided. Great long-term opportunity as we grow.



**Key Responsibilities**

- **Tenant Support & Communication**: Handle all messages/inquiries 
, chat, phone) in clear, professional English; provide guidance on using Payanywhere online portal for payments; encourage tenants to switch to online (e.g., buy prepaid cash cards at Dollar General).

- **Payments & Collections**: Track/process online payments via Payanywhere portal; send reminders and weekly updates (amounts due, neighborhood events) via Rent Manager or GoHighLevel
s; perform collection calls/emails; log promises-to-pay and update resident records in Rent Manager.

- **Access Control**: Use smart lock app to remotely manage PIN codes, open/close hallway/entry doors and individual room doors (e.g., for forgotten keys or fingerprint issues); monitor entry/exit logs.

- **Resident Verification**: Request/upload resident selfies/photos to Rent Manager for profiles; maintain a no-last-name photo gallery for hallways (security/who-belongs); use photos to verify room access.

- **Maintenance & Work Orders**: Assign tasks (make-ready, repairs, projects, cleaning) to on-site crew (cleaning 6 days/week, part-time maintenance/facility manager) or contractors (coordinate with John) via Rent Manager work orders; follow up on progress; review checklists, photos, video footage for quality; rate/close orders.

- **Monitoring & Security**: Check camera system for building conditions/issues; report problems; download video clips occasionally (a few times/month) for i
/evidence.

- **Marketing Assistance**: Use GoHighLevel for outreach to prospective residents (e.g., social media/Facebook/Instagram posts if experienced); assist with Rent Manager
s for current residents.

- **General**: Keep accurate records/reports in Rent Manager; enforce house rules; assist with onboarding as needed.



**Requirements**

- Previous experience in property management, virtual assistance, or similar (handling tenants, payments, maintenance preferred).

- Excellent spoken/written English—strong phone communication essential for tenant support.

- Highly tech-savvy and comfortable learning/using apps/portals (Rent Manager, Payanywhere, GoHighLevel, smart lock systems a plus; experience with
/Instagram very helpful for marketing).

- Organized, proactive, detail-oriented; able to work independently with checklists.

- Reliable high-speed internet, quiet workspace, computer + smartphone (with good camera/mic for calls). We will ask you to run Ooma's free custom speed test (
) plus a general one at speedtest.net (to our approximate location or a US server). We will ask you to share results and do a test call with us.



- Available ~20 hours/week with good overlap to US Eastern Time (e.g., mornings/afternoons your time).



**What We Offer**

- 100% remote work from anywhere in the Philippines.

- Competitive starting pay (~$500–$800/month) with room to grow as hours increase or we add properties.

- Full training and ongoing support on all tools.

- Long-term, stable role with potential bonuses for strong performance (e.g., high collections, quick issue resolution).



**How to Apply**  

Please send your resume/CV and a short message (1–2 paragraphs) including:  

1. Your relevant experience (property management, VA, tenant support, software like Rent Manager/GoHighLevel/smart locks).  

2. Why you're interested in remote boarding house management with digital tools.  

3. Your available hours per week and typical overlap with US Eastern Time.  

4. Your current internet speed/setup.



We review applications promptly and respond to qualified candidates within 48 hours. Looking forward to hearing from you!

Our team operates fully remote across multiple departments including Customer Support, Supply Chain, Creative, Marketing, and Finance. With growth comes complexity, and we are now looking for a Head of Operations who can bring structure, clarity, and execution across the company.



This is not a passive role. This is a high-impact position where you will work directly with the founder as a right hand to ensure departments run smoothly, reporting is consistent, and operational bottlenecks are solved early.



If you enjoy building structure, improving workflows, and managing remote teams in a fast-moving e-commerce environment, this opportunity can become a long-term career path with strong growth potential.

Operational Leadership

---

 for team communication

title: YouTube Video Editor for Online Course Content
description:

Structure the lesson so it is clear and easy to follow

title: Experienced Accountant
description:
Accountant (Remote)



About Us

We’re on a mission to bring high-quality, air- and oven-dried meat snacks to consumers across the U.S. through our growing portfolio of brands. As pioneers in the American biltong space, we take pride in offering protein-packed, clean-label snacks made with simple and honest ingredients.

The ideal candidate is comfortable working with different accounting functions such as payroll, accounts receivable, accounts payable, and financial statement preparation.

Work Setup

mbers and interact professionally with clients and staff.

title: Australian Buyer’s Agent Research VA (Experienced Only – Must Have Worked With Australian Buyers Agent)
description:
Job Description



We are an Australian property investment and buyer’s agency business looking for an experienced Property Research VA who has previously worked with an Australian Buyer’s Agent or Property Investment Company.



This is not an entry level role.



If you have not worked in the Australian property industry before, please do not apply.



We are specifically looking for someone who understands how Australian property acquisitions work and can assist with researching investment opportunities, analysing suburbs, and preparing property acquisition reports.



You will be working directly with the principal buyer’s agent to identify high-quality property opportunities and investment strategies.



Accuracy and attention to detail are critical in this role.



Your Responsibilities



You will assist with:



• Suburb and market research across Australian locations

• Identifying subdivision, duplex and granny flat potential

• Analysing zoning and council planning controls

• Reviewing recent comparable sales and rental data

• Preparing property investment research reports

• Assessing development potential and planning restrictions

• Researching off-market and acquisition opportunities

• Supporting the buyer’s agent with property acquisition analysis



This role requires analytical thinking, not just data collection.



Mandatory Experience (Non-Negotiable)



Applicants must meet all of the following criteria:



• Previously worked with an Australian Buyer’s Agent or Property Investment Firm

• Strong understanding of Australian property terminology and processes

• Experience conducting suburb and property investment research

• Ability to prepare structured property research reports

• Familiarity with Australian planning and zoning controls



This role is not suitable for general real estate VAs without Australian experience.



Preferred Tools Experience



Highly regarded if you have experience using Australian property research and planning tools such as:



Property Data Platforms



• CoreLogic / RP Data

• PriceFinder

• 
 and Domain research tools

• SQM Research

• Suburb analytics platforms



Planning & Development Research



• NSW Planning Portal

• Local Council LEP and DCP controls

• DA Tracker systems

• Zoning and minimum lot size analysis

• Section 10.7 Planning Certificates



Mapping & Land Information



• SIX Maps / Spatial Viewer

• Nearmap or aerial mapping tools

• Sewer service diagrams (Sydney Water / Dial Before You Dig)

• Flood and bushfire planning overlays



Market & Rental Analysis



• Comparable sales analysis

• Rental yield analysis

• Vacancy rate research

• Suburb growth trends



Reporting & Research Preparation



• Google Sheets / Excel

• Google Docs

• CRM systems used in Australian real estate



What We Are Looking For



We want someone who is:



• Extremely detail-oriented

• Able to analyse property investment opportunities

• Capable of preparing clear and professional research reports

• Comfortable working independently



This role supports real property acquisitions, so research accuracy is extremely important.



Application Instructions



To apply, please include the following:



The name of the Australian company or buyer’s agent you previously worked for



A sample property or suburb research report you prepared



A short explanation answering this question:



How would you check if a property in NSW allows subdivision or duplex development?



Applications without this information will not be reviewed.



Important



This role is not a training position.



We are specifically looking for someone who has already supported a buyer’s agent in Australia and understands the property research process.

title: product researcher
description:
Job Title: Part-Time Product Researcher (Dropshipping)



Job Description:

I am looking for a reliable part-time Product Researcher who will help me find profitable products for my dropshipping stores. The goal of this role is to save time by identifying products with strong sales potential and preparing clear product validation so I can quickly d
 whether the product is worth testing.

The stores operate using the dropshipping model, with products shipped mainly from suppliers in China, so experience with Chinese suppliers or marketplaces is a strong advantage.



Responsibilities:

-Research and identify potential products suitable for dropshipping stores

-Perform product validation before presenting products

-Prepare a clear product validation table/spreadsheet so the information is easy to analyze

-Conduct competitor analysis (pricing, ads, positioning, market demand, etc.)

-Evaluate whether a product has potential for building a brand around it

-Present products in a structured format that allows quick decision-making



Product Validation Should Include (Example):

-Product name and link to supplier

-Estimated product cost

-Suggested selling price

-Estimated margin

-Competitor examples

-Market demand indicators

-Advantages / disadvantages of the product

-Notes and recommendation



Requirements:

-Minimum 3 year of experience in product research for e-commerce or dropshipping 

-Ability to perform solid product validation and competitor research

-Ability to present data clearly in tables or spreadsheets

-Good analytical thinking

-Good written English communication



Nice to Have:

-Experience with dropshipping stores

-Experience working with Chinese suppliers or wholesalers

-Knowledge of platforms such as AliExpress, Alibaba, CJ Dropshipping, etc.



+PINEAPPLE+



Compensation:

-$3–$4 per hour

-Part-time, flexible hours





If you have experience in finding winning products and enjoy market research, feel free to apply.

title: YouTube Tutorial Creator – Cinematic SaaS & Tech Tutorials (4K)
description:
About Us



We run a growing YouTube channel focused on tutorials for AI tools, cloud hosting, and SaaS platforms. We're looking for a dedicated video creator to join us long-term and produce around 16 polished tutorial videos per month.



Reference style: youtu.be/gqO4dWXV3Lk



The Role



You take a short brief (3–4 sentences) and turn it into a complete, cinematic tutorial video – from script to final delivery.



What you'll create:

• A short avatar intro (15–20 sec, lip-synced) explaining what the viewer will learn

• The main tutorial (5–10 min) with screen recordings, zooms, callouts, and clear voiceover

• A short avatar outro (15–20 sec, lip-synced) wrapping things up

• Clean SRT subtitles

• Delivered in 16:9, 4K via Google Drive



Tools you'll cover include platforms like Vultr, Cloudways, vast.ai, Bluehost, Linode, Pinecone, OpenArt, and similar. We provide all accounts and access.



What We're Looking For



You're not just a video editor – you understand how to teach technical topics clearly. You know:

• What to explain and what to skip

• How to keep viewers engaged without overwhelming them

• How to pace a tutorial so it feels polished, not rushed

• When narration is needed and when visuals speak for themselves



Good English voiceover is essential. You should be comfortable recording your own voice.



Compensation

• Paid trial: $40 (guaranteed, paid regardless of outcome)

• Ongoing: $800–$950/month for ~16 videos/month

• Long-term position for the right person



How to Apply



Send us these two things:

1. A link to a tutorial video you created (SaaS, hosting, cloud, AI tools, or similar tech topics)

2. Confirm you can record your own voiceover for the paid trial



That's it. If your work fits, we'll send you the trial brief right away.

title: Video Editor
description:
About 6 Pillars Marketing (6PM)



Celebrating over 30 years of excellence, 6 Pillars Marketing (6PM) is Hawaii’s premier award-winning integrated marketing agency. We blend "Aloha Spirit" with cutting-edge digital technology to build unforgettable experiences across our six core pillars. At 6PM, we don't just create content; we build the visual heartbeat of our clients' brands.



The 6 Pillars of Excellence



Your role as a Video Production Editor will touch every facet of our agency, collaborating with specialists in: Marketing & Advertising | Public Relations | Interactive (Digital) | Experiential Marketing | Immersive Events | Community Relations



Role Overview



We are looking for a versatile Video Production Editor to lead our multi-channel content strategy. On behalf of our agency campaigns and for clients across a wide range of industries, you will transform raw footage into compelling, story-driven, high-performing content for YouTube, Podcasts, Social Media, and Streaming Platforms. The ideal candidate understands the distinct creative DNA required for a 30-minute podcast versus a 15-second TikTok and can execute both with award-winning excellence.



Key Responsibilities



1. Social Media & Micro-Content (High Priority)



- TikTok & Instagram Reels: Create, edit, and optimize high-engagement content. Stay ahead of platform-specific transitions, trending audio, and "scroll-stopping" hooks.

- Vertical Strategy: Expertly manage 9:16 vertical compositions, ensuring all elements are within "safe zones" for UI overlays.

- Content Repurposing: Strategically "atomize" long-form YouTube and Podcast content into high-impact snippets for social growth.



2. YouTube & Long-Form Production



- Narrative Editing: Build engaging story arcs for long-form videos (10–20+ minutes).

- Optimization: Create custom thumbnails, on-screen graphics (lower thirds, CTAs), and manage SEO elements such as chapter timestamps.

- Promotional & Venue Highlights: Produce branded sizzle reels, event recaps, and venue highlight videos that showcase spaces, experiences, and key features for marketing use.



3. Podcast & Audio Post-Production



- Audio Polish: Perform full vocal leveling, noise reduction, and multi-track mixing for professional broadcast quality.

- Video Podcasts: Execute multicam switching for "vodcasts" hosted on Spotify and YouTube.



4. Streaming & OTT Production



- Streaming Shorts: Create promotional content and "shorts" specifically formatted for streaming platforms such as Netflix, Hulu, and Disney+.

- Broadcast Standards: Ensure all streaming assets meet strict technical delivery specifications (color space, loudness, and bitrate).



Technical Stack (Required)



- Adobe Creative Cloud: Mastery of Premiere Pro, After Effects, and Photoshop.

- Mobile-First Tools: Expert-level proficiency in CapCut (Desktop and Mobile) for rapid social turnaround.

- Audio Engineering: Proficiency in Adobe Audition or Descript.

- Delivery Specs: Knowledge of encoding for Netflix/OTT specification exports.

- Collaboration: Experience using 
 and Asana for project management.

- AI & Emerging Tools: Willingness to learn, experiment with, and integrate AI-powered tools to enhance editing workflows, content repurposing, audio cleanup, captioning, and overall production efficiency.



Time requirement



8am - 4pm Philippine Time (1 hour lunch)

Monday - Friday

13th Month Included

US Holiday Schedule



Requirements for consideration -
 



- 5+ years of experience as a Video Editor

- Include an animal that best represents you in the subject line

- Include your portfolio via
: Include examples of both short-form (Reels/TikTok) and long-form (YouTube/Podcast) work.

- Tool Kit: List your top three go-to tools for rapid, high-quality editing.



Compensation: $2,000 USD per month



Cultural Fluency & Local Context (preferred)



- Island Intelligence: A deep-rooted understanding of the distinct identities and nuances of the eight major Hawaiian Islands, especially Oahu, Maui, Kauai, and Hawaii Island.

- Cultural Sensitivity: The ability to represent the "Aloha Spirit" authentically and accurately, ensuring cultural nuances are respected for both local and global audiences.



Overall, we are looking for a person with a positive attitude, professionalism, reliability, great time management skills, open communication, and a passion to learn! If this is you or someone you know, please apply with your resume, portfolio and cover letter

title: Hiring: Mechanical Explainer Video Editor (How Things Really Work Style)
description:

nts)

? Can add motion graphics and cutaway diagrams

? Can show past work in a similar style



D
 with your portfolio.

title: SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
About Us:

We are a growing retail brand with an established physical store and an expanding online presence. As we scale our e-commerce and digital channels, we are focused on building strong organic visibility, improving customer experience, and converting traffic into long-term growth.



We are looking for an SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist to lead our organic search strategy and support broader digital marketing efforts. This role is SEO-first, with digital marketing as a secondary focus.



You will work closely with our developer and content creator to ensure SEO strategies are implemented correctly, content aligns with search intent, and the website performs well both technically and experientially.



About the Role:

The SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist will be responsible for increasing our online visibility, website engagement, and organic-driven sales. This role focuses on strategy, execution, and optimization, ensuring that traffic not only reaches the site but also converts.



Key Responsibilities:

SEO Strategy & Execution (Primary)

Develop and execute SEO strategies for local search, website growth, and e-commerce performance.

Conduct keyword research and map keywords to relevant pages.

Optimize product pages, category pages, and landing pages.

Improve website structure, internal linking, and overall content clarity.



On-Page SEO & Website Engagement:

Improve on-page SEO to increase time on site, clicks, and conversions.

Ensure pages are easy to read, fast, and user-friendly.

Optimize page titles, headings, meta descriptions, images, and layout.



Off-Page SEO & Local Visibility:

Manage and optimize Google Business Profile.

Improve Google Maps and local search visibility.

Support review generation and online reputation management.

Build trust through ethical backlinks, citations, and brand mentions.



Content & SEO Writing Collaboration:

Plan and optimize SEO-driven content (blogs, guides, FAQs).

Update and improve existing content based on performance data.



Work closely with the content creator to ensure content:

Matches search intent.

Supports keyword strategy.

Aligns with brand voice and customer needs.



Digital Marketing & Social Support (Secondary):

Support social media and brand visibility efforts.

Align social content with SEO-optimized landing pages.

Ensure social traffic leads to a strong on-site experience.



Technical SEO Collaboration:

Identify technical SEO issues and translate them into clear action items.



Work closely with the developer to implement improvements related to:

Site speed and performance.

Indexing and crawlability.

Schema markup and SEO best practices.



Tracking & Reporting:

Monitor performance using Google Analytics and Google Search Console.

Track rankings, traffic, engagement, and conversions.

Provide clear reports, insights, and improvement plans.



Requirements:

Proven SEO experience (local SEO + website or e-commerce).

Strong understanding of on-page and off-page SEO.

Experience with SEO and analytics tools.

Ability to collaborate effectively with developers and content creators.

Analytical, detail-oriented, and performance-driven mindset.





What to Include in Your Application?

Please submit one Google Drive link containing the following (do not attach large files):

CV / Resume (PDF).

Examples of Meta 
 & Instagram) campaigns you have managed (Brief description, goals, and results if available).

Examples of Shopify stores or on-page SEO work you’ve done (Links or screenshots are acceptable).

A short explanation of your technical strengths (On-page SEO, content optimization, analytics, tools used, working with developers). 



Important:

Please upload all files to Google Drive and share one accessible link.

This helps keep applications organized and avoids large
 attachments.

Send it to expert works amb 1228 at gmail dot com please remove spaces

title: Meta API Specialist – Two-Way DM to CRM Integration
description:
We are looking for a skilled Meta API Specialist to develop a two-way integration between Meta Direct Messages (DMs) and our custom-built CRM system. The goal is to automatically sync incoming and outgoing messages fro
ta platforms (such as Instagram and
 Messenger) with our internal CRM so that conversations can be managed, tracked, and responded to directly within our system.



This role requires strong experience with the Meta 
) Graph API, messaging webhooks, and building scalable integrations between external APIs and internal platforms.



Key Responsibilities

 • Develop a two-way integration between Meta Direct Messages and our custom CRM.

 • Connect and manage messaging data from Instagram and
 Messenger via the Meta Graph API.

 • Implement webhooks for real-time message synchronization between Meta platforms and the CRM.

 • Ensure bi-directional communication, allowing messages sent from the CRM to appear in Meta DMs and vice versa.

 • Maintain reliable message delivery, error handling, and logging.

 • Work with our internal team to map conversation data structures and CRM workflows.

 • Ensure compliance with Meta platform policies and API requirements.

 • Optimize performance and scalability of the integration.

 • Provide documentation and basic technical handover upon completion.



Required Skills & Experience

 • Strong experience with Meta 
) Graph API.

 • Proven experience integrating Instagra
ssaging API and/or
 Messenger API.

 • Experience implementing webhooks and event-driven architectures.

 • Backend development experience (Node.js, Python, PHP, or similar).

 • Experience integrating external APIs with custom CRM systems.

 • Understanding of authentication methods such as OAuth and access tokens.

 • Ability to debug API issues and handle rate limits, errors, and edge cases.



Preferred Qualifications

 • Experience with customer messaging automation systems.

 • Experience building chat integrations or omnichannel messaging systems.

 • Familiarity with scalable cloud environments (AWS, GCP, or similar).

 • Experience working with CRM data models and conversation pipelines.



Project Scope

 • Integrate Meta messaging APIs with an existing proprietary CRM.

 • Enable real-time synchronization of conversations.

 • Allow agents to read and reply to Meta DMs directly from the CRM.

 • Ensure conversation history and metadata are stored correctly within the CRM.



Hiring Process



To ensure we find the right technical match, the hiring process will include the following steps:

 1. Application Review – Candidates submit their experience, portfolio, or relevant API integration work.

 2. Technical Interview – A video interview to discuss previous API integrations, Meta platform experience, and architecture approach.

 3. Technical Assessment (Optional) – A short architecture discussion or technical task related to the integration.

 4. Final Interview – Review of approach, timelines, and collaboration expectations.

 5. Contract Offer – Selected candidate will receive a formal project agreement.



Only candidates who successfully complete the interview and evaluation process will be considered for the final role.



How to Apply



Please submit the following:

 • A brief introduction and relevant experience

 • Examples of API integrations you have built

 • Any experience specifically with Meta /
 / Instagra
ssaging APIs

 • Your estimated availability and hourly/project rate



We look forward to working with an experienced developer who can help us build a reliable, scalable messaging integration between Meta platforms and our CRM.

title: Experienced Funnel Builder for Ecommerce Wanted, Funnelish Experience Required
description:

Hey there! ????

Who we are looking for

• Has experience building ecommerce funnels and knows how to work with Funnelish.

• Thinks strongly in terms of conversion.

• Can work quickly without compromising on quality.

• Is creative, proactive, and thinks along with us.

• Is communicative and reliable.

• Is looking for a long-term collaboration.

title: Premiere Pro Short-Form Video Editor - Long-term
description:
Please only apply if you can match this editing style with ease: 





Start Here (Pay + Setup)

• We start part-time (20 hours/week)

• Deliver 7 shorts/week (45–60s) in our exact style

• Pay to start: $600/month

• If performance is great (quality + speed + consistency), the idea is to go full-time and there will be an opportunity to take on more responsibility long-term, and receive greater compensation.



---



This is NOT a generic captions job.



We edit in an animated, high quality, modern health style.

Think: bold headlines, metric overlays (Whoop/EightSleep), animations, high retention pacing. 



Before applying, watch our Reference Style you are required to match



Reference Folder (copy/paste into browser):





(Contains 2 of our edited shorts + overlays/assets)



If you cannot match our style exactly, do not apply.

You must be very comfortable replicating this exact style.



---



What you will do

• Edit 7 shorts/week (30–60s) from raw talking-head + b-roll

• Hook-first editing (first 1 second must hit, first 3 seconds must be strong)

• Add clean dynamic captions + word highlighting (not overdone)

• Add metric overlays (Whoop/EightSleep screenshots), headline cards, simple animations

• Use Canva for quick visual assets (rounded edges, frames, text cards) when needed

• Export correctly for IG/TikTok/YouTube Shorts (9:16, safe margins, clean file names)

• Follow SOPs and keep Google Drive organized

• Daily status updates + hit deadlines



Expected delivery: 7 shorts/week, with daily progress updates and fast revisions (same day when needed).



Bonus (nice to have)

• After Effects (simple motion graphics)

• Thumbnail / cover design

• Strong retention instincts



Requirements

• Premiere Pro (required)

• Canva (required)

• Fast workstation + reliable internet

• Great English comprehension & Fluency

• Reliable delivery + fast revisions



---



Trial (simple + flexible)



We’ll start with one quick 1 test edit, then a short paid trial phase to make sure the workflow is smooth.

You should be comfortable delivering consistently and revising quickly when needed.



---



IMPORTANT (Filter)



To apply, start your message with: "sf_edit"

Applications without this will be ignored.



In your application, include:

1. Your best 3 short-form edits (accessible sharing links via Google Drive)

2. 1 edit most similar to our reference style (required) (accessible sharing link via Google Drive)

3. Confirm: Premiere Pro + Canva

4. Your timezone + availability

5. Answer: Can you easily replicate our reference style shared above in the drive folder? (YES/NO)

title: Customer Support Expert
description:
We’re looking for hungry, motivated, and hardworking individuals to join our team as Customer Support Representatives and 
 Moderators. If you can communicate confidently in English and enjoy interacting with people from around the world—especially the U.S.—we want to hear from you.





Who We Are

We’re a 3-year-old customer support company dedicated to giving our clients the best customer experience possible. We help businesses grow by handling their customer interactions, converting leads, and providing reliable, high-quality support.





What We’re Looking For

We want tea
mbers who are excited to learn, grow, and perform at a high level. You’re a great fit if you have:

- A willingness to be trained and coached

- Strong English communication skills (especially in chat)

- A laptop/PC with a reliable internet connection and a backup option

- Fast and stable internet (required for workflow)

- The ability to respond quickly when contacted

- Basic sales or persuasion skills to help convert customers

- Emotional intelligence when dealing with client concerns

- Strong work ethic, reliability, and professionalism





Job Responsibilities

As part of our team, you will:

- Communicate with customers on behalf of our clients to ensure a smooth and positive experience

- Handle inquiries, assist with concerns, and support customers effectively

- Provide sales pitches or conversion strategies to encourage customers to invest in our client’s services

- Clock in/out and begin working as scheduled

- Represent our clients with professionalism and care





Work Schedule (PH Time)

Operations are conducted under the following shifts:

- Shift 1: 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM

- Shift 2: 9:00 PM – 7:00 AM







Compensation

- Starting Rate: $1.50 per hour

- Commissions: 3% sales commission (with potential to grow your base rate up to $4/hour depending on performance)





Performance Bonuses: 

Awarded every cut-off based on overall account performance, adherence to company systems, and quality of execution.

Bonuses are structured to reward:

- Strong conversion performance

- Proper upselling and session stacking

- Consistent application of company messaging systems

- Discipline in following friction timing guidelines

- Overall team collaboration and reliability

Bonus eligibility is determined based on measurable performance metrics and manager evaluation.



Low Performance: 8% commission rate only for poor results



We reward hard work, quality performance, and consistent improvement.



How to Apply

Send your application and include “STELLAR SUPPORT” & preferred work schedule in your subject line.

We’re looking for people who want to grow with us—if that’s you, we’d love to meet you!

title: Klarna & PayPal Dispute Expert
description:
We are an e-commerce company focused on providing excellent products to our customers, primarily through platforms like Klarna and PayPal. As our business continues to grow, we are seeking an experienced Klarna & PayPal Dispute Agent to join our team. You will play a key role in managing and resolving payment disputes efficiently to ensure a smooth customer experience.



Responsibilities:



•Review and manage Klarna and PayPal disputes in a timely and professional manner.

Investigate chargebacks and customer claims by analyzing transaction details, policies, and customer history.

Communicate with customers, Klarna, and PayPal to resolve disputes, ensuring compliance with company policies.

Prepare and submit documentation to Klarna and PayPal to defend chargeback cases.

Track the status of ongoing disputes and keep relevant records up to date.

Ensure that customer queries related to payment disputes are resolved to maintain customer satisfaction.

Provide clear and concise reports on dispute resolutions and outcomes.

Suggest improvements in internal dispute handling procedures based on experience.

Skills & Qualifications:



Proven experience in handling Klarna and PayPal disputes, chargebacks, and refunds.

Strong knowledge of e-commerce transaction systems and policies for Klarna, PayPal, and other payment processors.

Excellent communication skills with the ability to handle sensitive situations empathetically.

Ability to analyze transaction data and identify patterns in disputes.

Detail-oriented with strong organizational skills to manage multiple disputes concurrently.

Proficient in using dispute resolution tools and platforms (Shopify, Freshdesk, PayPal, Klarna dispute portals, etc.).

Problem-solving mindset, capable of identifying issues and providing effective resolutions.

Strong knowledge of e-commerce and consumer protection laws.

A background in customer service is highly beneficial.

Preferred Experience:



Experience working in a fast-paced e-commerce environment.

Familiarity with dispute resolution strategies to minimize chargeback rates and protect business revenue.

Multilingual capabilities are a plus (particularly Dutch, English, and German).





What We Offer:



Flexible working hours with the possibility of remote work.

A dynamic and growing company with opportunities for advancement.

A supportive and friendly work environment.





If you are a proactive, detail-oriented individual with expertise in managing Klarna and PayPal disputes, we would love to hear from you! Please send your resume and a cover letter detailing your experience with payment disputes.

title: Personal Brand Developer
description:
Position Summary:

The Personal Brand Developer is responsible for shaping, managing, and expanding the public brand identity of an executive, entrepreneur, or public-facing professional. This role builds a cohesive brand strategy across digital platforms, speaking engagements, media presence, and partnerships to increase visibility, credibility, and influence. The ideal candidate is strategic, creative, and skilled at storytelling, digital marketing, and reputation management.



Key Responsibilities:

• Develop and execute a comprehensive personal brand strategy and roadmap

• Define brand voice, messaging pillars, and visual identity guidelines

• Manage social media presence across key platforms (e.g., LinkedIn, Instagram, YouTube, podcasts)

• Create, curate, and schedule engaging brand-aligned content

• Draft thought-leadership pieces, blogs, bios, captions, and talking points

• Coordinate speaking engagements, media features, interviews, and appearances

• Build and maintain relationships with press, partners, and influencers

• Oversee personal website or landing pages and ensure brand alignment

• Monitor analytics and audience growth; adjust strategy based on data

• Manage online reputation and respond to brand opportunities or risks

• Support book projects, courses, or product launches if applicable

• Develop brand collaborations, sponsorships, and strategic partnerships



Required Skills & Qualifications:

• Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Public Relations, or related field (or equivalent experience)

• 3+ years of experience in branding, marketing, PR, or social media strategy

• Proven experience developing or managing personal or influencer brands

• Strong content writing, storytelling, and messaging skills

• Proficiency with social media platforms, analytics tools, and scheduling platforms

• Understanding of audience building, engagement, and community growth

• Strong project management and organizational skills



Preferred Qualifications:

• Experience working with entrepreneurs, executives, influencers, or public figures

• Experience with media relations, podcast coordination, or public speaking support

• Familiarity with brand photography and video content direction

• Knowledge of SEO and personal websites/portfolio platforms



Personal Attributes:

• Highly creative with strategic thinking ability

• Discreet, professional, and trustworthy with confidential information

• Confident communicator and collaborator

• Detail-oriented, proactive, and deadline-driven

title: Website, SEO Specialist
description:
Position Summary:

The Website & SEO Specialist is responsible for managing, optimizing, and growing the organization’s online presence. This role ensures that our websites are user-friendly, visually engaging, technically sound, and highly visible across major search engines. The ideal candidate combines technical expertise, creative problem-solving, and data-driven strategy to increase traffic, conversions, and overall brand visibility.



Key Responsibilities:

• Manage day-to-day website updates, content publishing, and maintenance

• Perform ongoing SEO strategy, including on-page, off-page, and technical SEO

• Conduct keyword research and implement SEO-driven content strategies

• Optimize site structure, internal linking, and metadata for ranking performance

• Monitor website performance, uptime, page speed, and mobile optimization

• Track and analyze site analytics (Google Analytics, Search Console, etc.)

• Develop and manage landing pages for campaigns and service lines

• Collaborate with marketing, design, and content teams on digital strategy

• Identify and resolve website bugs, SEO issues, and broken links

• Implement best practices for accessibility, UX, and conversion optimization

• Manage integrations such as forms, CRM connections, and third-party tools

• Stay current on SEO and web trends, algorithm updates, and digital best practices



Required Skills & Qualifications:

• Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Information Technology, or related field (or equivalent experience)

• 2+ years of experience in website management and SEO

• Proficiency with WordPress, Wix, Squarespace, or similar CMS platforms

• Strong understanding of SEO principles, Google ranking factors, and keyword strategy

• Experience with Google Analytics, Search Console, Tag Manager, and SEO tools (SEMrush, Ahrefs, Moz, etc.)

• Knowledge of basic HTML/CSS; familiarity with JavaScript a plus

• Experience improving page speed, Core Web Vitals, and mobile responsiveness

• Strong copywriting or editing skills for SEO-friendly content

• Ability to interpret data and translate insights into strategy

• Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail



Preferred Qualifications:

• Experience with multi-location or service-based organizations

• Background in healthcare, social services, or professional services sectors

• Experience with paid search or social ad optimization

• Understanding of accessibility standards (ADA/WCAG)



Personal Attributes:

• Detail-oriented with strong follow-through

• Proactive and solutions-focused

• Strong communication and collaboration skills

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced, growing organization

title: Senior Pinterest Media Buyer & Creative Strategist (High-Spend Experience Required)
description:
We are an established e-commerce brand looking for a top-tier Pinterest Media Buyer who lives and breathes the platform. This is not a role for a general social media manager or a beginner testing the waters. We need a seasoned expert who knows exactly how to drive profitable traffic, design scroll-stopping creatives, and scale campaigns aggressively.



If you do not have a proven track record of managing large ad spends and working with big e-commerce clients, please do not apply.



Your Responsibilities:



End-to-End Campaign Management: Launch, manage, and optimize Pinterest ad campaigns for maximum ROAS.



Creative Strategy & Execution: Design and produce high-converting Pinterest creatives (Standard Pins, Video Pins, Idea Pins) based on deep knowledge of what works specifically on this platform.



Aggressive Scaling: Identify winning campaigns and scale them profitably without breaking the CPA.



Data Analysis: Continuously monitor dashboards, run A/B tests on creatives and copy, and pivot strategies based on hard data.



Requirements:



Deep, specialized knowledge of the Pinterest Ads Manager and Pinterest organic/paid algorithms.



Strong graphic design and video editing skills specifically tailored to the Pinterest aesthetic.



Proven experience managing high-spend accounts for significant e-commerce clients (experience in highly visual niches like home decor, women's fashion, or beauty/skincare is a major advantage).



A highly analytical mindset with the ability to turn data into actionable scaling strategies.



MANDATORY APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (READ CAREFULLY):



We strictly filter our applicants. To be considered for this position, your application MUST include the following:



Verifiable Screenshots: You must attach screenshots from your actual Pinterest Ad accounts showing your ad spend, scaling phases, and ROAS.



Client Portfolio: You must provide the names and direct website links of the stores and big clients you have worked with.



Creative Examples: A link to a portfolio or folder showing Pinterest creatives you have personally designed that were successful.



Note: If your application does not include the screenshots AND the specific store links, it will be immediately deleted without review. No exceptions.



To prove you have read this entire post, please start your application message with the exact phrase: "scale"

title: Inbound Outbound Customer Service
description:
Whale Done Sprinklers & Irrigation – Home Services (USA)



We are a growing U.S.-based home service company (sprinkler, irrigation, drainage) looking for a reliable, organized, and confident CSR to handle both inbound and outbound calls.



Monday – Friday

7:00 AM – 7:00 PM Texas Central Time

$1000 monthly Salary



This role is for someone who:

Loves structure and process

Is comfortable on the phone

Is not afraid to make outbound calls

Can schedule appointments, handle follow-ups, and ask for payment confidently

Cares about serving homeowners well while still hitting numbers



If you’ve worked with HVAC, plumbing, cleaning, or any home service business, that’s a huge plus.



????? What You’ll Be Doing

Answering inbound calls from homeowners

Making outbound calls to:

Past customers

Follow-ups and call-backs

Potential referral partners

Scheduling appointments accurately

Explaining our process clearly and calmly

Asking for payment as part of the scheduling process

Handling common objections (price, “I’ll think about it,” “I’ll call around,” etc.)

Logging calls, notes, and follow-ups in our system

Tracking your daily call activity and results

Representing our brand with professional, calm, respectful communication



? This Role Is a Great Fit If You:

Are highly organized and like following systems

Are comfortable talking on the phone all day

Are not afraid of outbound calls

Can stay calm and professional with customers

Can be empathetic but still guide the call to a decision

Are reliable, consistent, and detail-oriented

Care about doing things the right way, not just the fast way

Are comfortable with sales conversations in a helpful, non-pushy way

Like tracking numbers and improving performance



? Big Plus If You Have:

Experience speaking with American customers

Experience in:

HVAC

Plumbing

Cleaning services

Irrigation / home services

Call center scheduling roles

Experience with:

Booking appointments

Handling objections

Follow-ups and call-backs

CRM or call tracking systems



? Schedule & Pay

Monday – Friday

7:00 AM – 7:00 PM Texas Central Time



Bonuses for after-hours and weekend bookings

Long-term, stable position for the right person

Performance and reliability are rewarded



? This Role Is NOT for You If:

You dislike structure, scripts, or processes

You are uncomfortable making outbound calls

You avoid asking for payment or closing the loop

You prefer chat/email only and don’t like phone work

You don’t like tracking your numbers or performance



???? How to Apply



Please share your disc profile and also

read the following and put them in order based on which Values fit you better?



What I am looking for in no particular order is how would you rank the Blueprint, Action, Nurture, Knowledge in order based on your personality?



BLUEPRINT



Order Process

Organization Consistency

Predictability Planning

title: Podcast Trailer Editor (Video Editor)
description:
Job Title: Podcast Trailer Editor



REQUIRED - FILL OUT THIS FORM IN FULL FOR YOUR APPLICATION TO BE CONSIDERED: 



Location: Remote Working 



Experience: 2–3 Years Minimum (Required)



Position Overview

We are seeking a dedicated Podcast Trailer Editor to craft impactful trailers from our long-form podcast content. You will collaborate with our in-house team to find the strongest hooks, build engaging narratives, and deliver edits for YouTube, Shorts, Instagram Reels, TikTok and X. The ideal candidate has a sharp story sense, excellent pacing, strong audio skills, and proven experience editing podcast content. Familiarity with the trading and finance niche is a bonus.



Responsibilities 

• Watch long-form recordings and identify powerful hooks, headlines and CTAs for impactful trailers.

• Edit tight, high-retention impactful trailers and cut-downs (15–120 seconds) for Shorts, Reels, TikTok, X and YouTube preview intros.

• Add dynamic captions and kinetic text that match brand guidelines and improve retention.

• Clean and mix audio: remove filler, reduce noise, balance levels and loudness-normalise.

• Colour correct and lightly grade to match our studio look.

• Source and place relevant B-roll or screen recordings to reinforce key ideas.

• Deliver correctly formatted masters across aspect ratios (9:16, 1:1, 16:9) and platform specs.

• Manage multiple edits simultaneously, meeting tight deadlines and same-day turnarounds when required.

• Maintain organised project files & carry out any revisions in a timely manner.

• QC every export for typos, sync, audio pops, caption accuracy and brand consistency.



Requirements

• Very strong communication with quick responses in messaging applications.

• Expert proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro. Competent in After Effects for titles and light motion; Audition or Resolve/Fairlight for audio.

• Demonstrable experience editing impactful trailers and shorts for podcasts, creators or media brands.

• Knowledge of social platform best practices, delivery specs and caption workflows.

• Strong story editing, pacing and beat-matching with music and SFX.

• Minimum of 2–3 years of professional video editing experience.

• Portfolio showing impactful trailers, podcast cut-downs and long-to-short transformations.

• Strong organisational and multitasking abilities with keen attention to detail.

• Reliable hardware and internet suitable for 4K multicam projects and rapid renders.



Nice to Have

• Experience with 
 & Notion.

• Understanding of trading or forex topics and terminology.



IMPORTANT

• Please fill out the attached form in FULL DETAIL. Any candidates that fail to do this on application will be ignored.

title: VFX / Motion Designer - Trading Animations
description:
Job Title: VFX / Motion Designer - Trading Animations

Location: Remote Working

Experience: 2–3 Years Minimum (Required)

Working Hours: 40 hours a week (9:00am - 5:00pm UK)



***PLEASE FILL OUT THIS FORM TO APPLY - 



Position Overview

We are seeking a VFX / Motion Designer to create clear, engaging animations that explain trading ideas. Most of your work will be in Adobe After Effects. You will make custom animations for candlesticks, chart patterns and price movement that help viewers understand what is happening on a chart. A basic understanding of trading is helpful. Experience in Blender or Cinema 4D is a bonus, not a requirement.



Some of our projects: 







Responsibilities

• Design simple, on-brand animations for candlesticks, OHLC bars, volume and common chart patterns like flags, wedges and head and shoulders.

• Animate price movement on a chart, including wicks, gaps, support and resistance, trend lines, breakouts, stop loss and target boxes.

• Add clear on-screen labels and callouts to highlight key points and numbers.

• Create reusable After Effects project files so editors can change colours, labels and timings quickly.

• Build short title screens, name labels, chapter cards, transitions and end screens that match our brand.

• Add short emphasis captions or bold words when needed for clarity.

• Prepare versions in different sizes for YouTube, Shorts, Reels and TikTok (16:9, 9:16, 1:1).

• Keep files tidy with clear names and folders, and include a simple handover note for editors.

• Check each export for spelling, readability on mobile, smooth motion, clean edges and brand colours.

• Work with producers and editors to plan the visuals and make quick improvements from feedback.



Requirements

• Very strong communication with quick responses in messaging apps.

• Advanced skills in Adobe After Effects, including keyframing, shapes, masks, timing and basic tracking.

• Portfolio that shows chart or candlestick animations, or clean data and infographic-style motion work.

• Basic knowledge of trading visuals and terms such as candles, support and resistance, trends and patterns.

• Good eye for layout and typography so on-screen information is easy to read.

• Well organised file management and a consistent way of working.

• Reliable computer and internet for rendering and file transfers.



Nice to Have

• Blender or Cinema 4D for simple 3D text or logo moves and basic camera moves.

• DaVinci Resolve or Fusion experience.

• Comfort using simple tools or plugins that speed up work.

• Familiarity with 
, Google Drive, Slack and Notion.

• Ability to show heatmaps, order flow or indicators in a clean and readable way.



IMPORTANT

• Please include a portfolio link. Applications without a portfolio link will be ignored. Include at least 2 examples of candlestick or chart animations if possible.



Additional

• Experience creating visuals for trading, finance or investment content is a strong bonus and will strengthen your application.

title: Graphic designer (Future creative strategist)
description:
Graphic Designer (Growth Path Into Marketing & Creative Direction)



We’re looking for a skilled graphic designer to join our creative team.

This role is perfect for someone who enjoys designing but also wants to learn the marketing side behind high-performing ads.



You’ll work inside a team of designers and collaborate directly with our marketing department. If you want long-term growth, structure, and a chance to develop into a more strategic creative role, this is for you.



What You’ll Do



Create 20 high-quality static ads per day (product shots, collages, lifestyle scenes, simple UGC-style frames)



Work in a team of multiple graphic designers



Use Gemini / Canva / Photoshop (or your preferred workflow)



Design ads that look trustworthy, clean, and authentic



Help brainstorm new creative angles and concepts



Follow brand guidelines and maintain a consistent visual identity



Use performance feedback to improve your designs



Salary & Bonus System



Base salary: $400/month



Bonus system: the best-performing designer can DOUBLE their salary



Bonuses are based on creative performance and impact



Clear structure, transparent system



Top creatives get rewarded heavily



This isn’t a typical low-level design job — we invest in designers who show growth and ownership.



What You’ll Learn



You don’t need previous marketing experience — you will learn it on the job.



You’ll gain real performance marketing knowledge, including:



What makes an ad convert



How to build creatives using trust / scarcity / authority / offer principles



How to read basic performance data (CTR, CPC, Hook Rate)



How to think in marketing angles, not just visuals



How to build creatives for older demographics (40–70+)



How real ecommerce brands scale through creative testing



If you want to grow from a designer ? into someone who understands marketing ? and eventually creative direction, this role gives you that path.



Who We’re Looking For



A graphic designer with a good eye and strong aesthetic taste



Able to design fast while keeping quality high



Comfortable giving and receiving feedback



Interested in learning the marketing strategy behind your work



Reliable, consistent, and proactive



Someone who wants long-term growth, not just tasks



Bonus Skills



(Not required, but helpful)



Meta/Facebook ad experience



Photoshop or advanced Canva knowledge



Ecommerce or jewelry ad experience



Understanding of performance metrics



Why Join Us



100% remote



Work inside a structured creative team, not alone



Clear expectations, clear goals



Fast feedback loops



A stable brand with long-term growth



A real opportunity to move into creative direction + marketing if you grow



This role is for someone who takes pride in their work and wants to be part of a bigger creative engine — not just a production designer.
